name: Kharra-Ryn Tuta-Dam
title: the Soul Forger
lore: Kharra-Ryn, a determined young blacksmith, carries a pair of golden & molten hammers and is orbited by three glowing solar cores. She embodies the spirit of a living forge, capable of crafting the best Soulforges in the world.

abilities.name: Living Forge
abilities.details: Kharra-Ryn carries the heart of a forge within her, allowing her to forge an item for herself or allies anywhere on the map.

abilities.name: Core Breach
abilities.details: Kharra-Ryn smashes one of her solar cores with a hammer, launching it in a line. The core deals [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) to the first enemy hit, slightly [db]knocking back[/] the target and reducing their [db]physical power[/] for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Molten Impact
abilities.details: Kharra-Ryn imbues her hammers, causing her next three basic attacks within a few seconds to deal bonus [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [hp]health[/]) and apply a stack of <span>Molten Impact[/] to the target.[n]Upon reaching three <span>Molten Impact[/] stacks, the target is dealt [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with the target's [hp]health[/]) and gets [db]stunned[/] for a short duration. The stacks are then removed and can be replied again after a short cooldowns per target.

abilities.name: Foundry Force
abilities.details: Kharra-Ryn slams both of her hammers down simultaneously, creating a powerful shockwave around her, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) and briefly [db]slowing[/] all enemies hit.[n]When <span>Foundry Force[/] hits an enemy who has at least one <span>Molten Impact[/] stack, it will immediately maximise the stacks to trigger the stun effect.

abilities.name: Solar Cores
abilities.details: Kharra-Ryn send all of her solar cores to orbit around an ally hero.[n]Each of the cores can completely block 1 ability from the enemy heroes. Once 3 blocks are completed, the solar cores will return to Kharra-Ryn.[n]While the solar cores are away, Kharra-Ryn will not be able to use her <span>Core Breach[/] ability until the solar cores return to her.
